name: Leeroy Jenkins
uprightMeaning: You've got that 'just quit my job with no backup plan' energy — broke but grinning. Don't overthink it; thinking is what stops people from doing stupid things that become great stories. Worst case: you embarrass yourself, and embarrassment is free.
reversedMeaning: Everyone's telling you to 'think it through.' Deep down you know this is a bad idea, but you still wanna send it. At least clear your Amazon cart first — those purchases have a return policy.

connections.narrative: Leeroy Jenkins meets the DIY Guru — you've got the audacity AND the skills. This is either going to be legendary or a legendary disaster, and honestly? Either way it'll make a great story. Just don't outsource your dream to someone else's vision board.

Leeroy Jenkins and RNGesus in the same draw — you're about to yeet yourself into a situation while fate spins the wheel. The timing is either perfectly aligned or cosmically chaotic. Either way, the universe is holding the camera.

Leeroy Jenkins walks into The Big Unsubscribe — a new beginning that requires an old ending. You can't start the next chapter if you're still rereading the last one. The leap works better with empty hands. Let go, then go.

Leeroy Jenkins meets The Sudden Uninstall — your blind enthusiasm just walked face-first into a wrecking ball. The good news? The structures that crumble were never solid to begin with. The bad news? Yeah, it still hurts. Rubble makes great foundations though.

Leeroy Jenkins on one end, Achievement Unlocked on the other — the fool's journey from 'I have no idea what I'm doing' to 'I still have no idea but I'm done.' The one who starts and the one who finishes are the same person, just with better stories.

name: The DIY Guru
uprightMeaning: You've got all the tools and you're not afraid to use them — YouTube tutorials have prepared you for this moment. The universe is your IKEA furniture and you didn't even look at the instructions. Manifest responsibly.
reversedMeaning: You're either under-selling yourself or about to start a project that'll end up on r/DiWHY. Talent is there, but direction is not. Put the glue gun down and make an actual plan.

connections.narrative: The DIY Guru meets Miss Know-It-All — action meets intuition, and they're giving each other the side-eye. You have all the tools AND all the wisdom, which means you have no excuse. Build it, but build it smart.

The DIY Guru face to face with The Toxic Ex — your talents are real, but where are they pointed? Same hands that build can also dig a hole. Ask yourself: are you creating or just coping in a really elaborate way?

The DIY Guru blessed by The Hopepunk Star — your skills just got a purpose upgrade. You're not just making things; you're making things that matter. Channel the talent into something that heals instead of just impresses.

name: Miss Know-It-All
uprightMeaning: Your gut feeling has a PhD and your intuition is running circles around everyone else's logic. You don't need to explain yourself — the people who get it, get it. The people who don't can argue with your silence.
reversedMeaning: You're sitting on a goldmine of insight but you've convinced yourself it's just anxiety. Spoiler: that 'random hunch' is actually your subconscious connecting dots. Stop second-guessing and trust the vibe.

connections.narrative: Miss Know-It-All and The Wi-Fi Hermit — two flavors of solitude, one rich inner world between them. She knows without speaking; he searches without stopping. The answers are inside you. Turn off the notifications and actually listen.

Miss Know-It-All meets The Chill Hang — knowing meets surrendering. Your brain wants answers but the universe has you in a headlock of patience. Stop trying to solve the puzzle and just hang there. Clarity arrives when you stop strangling it.

Miss Know-It-All navigating The 3 AM Thoughts — your intuition is real but the shadows are running a disinformation campaign. Trust your gut, but fact-check before acting. Not every ominous feeling is a prophecy; some are just indigestion.

name: Mother Nature's CEO
uprightMeaning: You're in full earth-goddess mode — nurturing everything, growing everywhere, making it look effortless. Your energy right now could make a cactus bloom. Share the abundance; there's plenty to go around.
reversedMeaning: You're giving so much to everyone else that you forgot to water your own plants. Self-care isn't selfish, it's maintenance. The goddess needs a spa day too.

connections.narrative: Mother Nature's CEO and The Big Boss — the sacred marriage of nurture and structure. One grows the garden, the other builds the fence. Too much softness and things fall apart; too much rigidity and nothing blooms. You need both, and you know it.

Mother Nature's CEO encounters The Situationship — abundance meets a big choice. Love, in whatever form, is the theme. Self-love, romantic love, or that one person you should probably stop texting. Let your heart lead, but bring your brain as the plus-one.

Mother Nature's CEO under The Hopepunk Star — a double blessing of abundance and hope. This is not wishful thinking; this is grounded optimism that knows the garden will bloom because you've been out there watering it. Keep going.

name: The Big Boss
uprightMeaning: Structure? You've got it. Authority? Wear it like a well-tailored suit. You're the one with the plan, the spreadsheet, and the five-year projection. Just make sure you're building an empire, not a prison — for yourself.
reversedMeaning: Control issues are showing. You're micromanaging the universe and the universe does not report to you. Loosen the grip before you choke out all the fun. Not everything needs a policy document.

connections.narrative: The Big Boss and The Tradition Guy — secular power meets spiritual authority. Law and faith, structure and belief. When they agree, you're building an institution. When they clash, figure out which authority actually serves YOUR highest good, not just the highest-ranking one.

The Big Boss called before Receipts — power is about to get audited. No throne is above the law, and the receipts are being pulled. If you've been fair, relax. If you've been... flexible with the rules, maybe start practicing your apology.

The Big Boss faces The Sudden Uninstall — your fortress is being stress-tested by reality. Control systems, hierarchies, carefully built walls — if they were on shaky ground, they won't survive the quake. What crumbles was never permanent. Rebuild with better blueprints.

name: The Tradition Guy
uprightMeaning: You're the keeper of the sacred 'how we've always done it.' There's wisdom in the old ways — but also maybe some outdated clauses. Know the rules well enough to know which ones are actually vibes rather than laws.
reversedMeaning: Dogma alert. You're following rules you never questioned and quoting authorities you've never fact-checked. Tradition without reflection is just peer pressure from dead people.

connections.narrative: The Tradition Guy and The Wi-Fi Hermit — inherited wisdom versus personal truth. The old books have answers, but the solo journey has different questions. Maybe it's time to check if the beliefs you were handed still fit the person you're becoming.

The Tradition Guy alongside Receipts — tradition measured against truth. Ancient doesn't automatically mean wise, and old rules that fail the fairness test are overdue for a rewrite. Honor the roots, but don't worship them if they're poisoning the soil.

name: The Situationship
uprightMeaning: A choice is standing in front of you wearing a very attractive outfit. Love, partnership, or a crossroads that feels like a rom-com climax. Pick with your whole chest — half measures get half results. And yes, it IS that deep.
reversedMeaning: You're stuck in analysis paralysis between two (or more) options, and they're all starting to look the same. The real choice isn't between people or paths — it's between who you've been and who you're becoming. Choose the one that makes future-you proud, not just present-you comfortable.

connections.narrative: The Situationship and Full Send Chariot — heart decides, then horsepower delivers. A meaningful choice meets determined action. Just make sure the decision was actually yours and not your hormones wearing a trench coat pretending to be rational thought.

The Situationship and The Vibe Balancer — passion looking for its equilibrium. Intense feelings want to flood everything, but chemistry happens in the blend, not the tsunami. Love hard, but don't dissolve yourself in another person.

The Situationship meets The Toxic Ex — the light and shadow of attachment. Love liberates; obsession takes hostages. Same relationship can be sanctuary or prison. Honestly examine: are you choosing freely, or are you just afraid to be alone?

name: Full Send Chariot
uprightMeaning: Victory is loading and you've got both hands on the wheel. You're moving fast, driven by pure willpower and possibly caffeine. Nothing can stop you — just make sure you're driving toward your own finish line, not someone else's.
reversedMeaning: You're speeding but the GPS is recalculating. Aggression without direction is just a tantrum with better PR. Pull over, check the map, then floor it.

connections.narrative: Full Send Chariot and Big Cat Energy — victory driven by willpower, sustained by quiet strength. You've got both the speed to win AND the resilience to last. Conquer with compassion; the flex is stronger when it's gentle.

Full Send Chariot meets RNGesus — your determined advance just hit the cosmic roulette wheel. You can steer but you can't control the road. Push forward with everything, but respect that timing is as important as speed. Even F1 cars need to pit.

name: Big Cat Energy
uprightMeaning: You've got that quiet strength — the kind that doesn't need to roar to be felt. It's not about crushing your enemies; it's about them knowing you could, and choosing not to. That's power. That's growth. That's hot.
reversedMeaning: You've been strong for so long you forgot it's okay to be soft. You're not a tank; you're a human. Let someone else carry the heavy stuff for a minute. The lion naps 20 hours a day and nobody calls it weak.

connections.narrative: Big Cat Energy and The Wi-Fi Hermit — outer courage replenished by inner solitude. You don't always have to be the strong one. Retreat isn't weakness; even apex predators spend most of their time napping. Rest, then return.

Big Cat Energy and Receipts — compassion standing next to fairness. True justice isn't cold, and true strength isn't force. It's holding the scales steady even when your own heart is in the balance. That's the real flex.

name: The Wi-Fi Hermit
uprightMeaning: You've gone off-grid — emotionally, socially, maybe literally. Your phone is on Do Not Disturb and your soul is doing a system update. The answers you're looking for aren't in the group chat. Stay in your cave; the clarity will come.
reversedMeaning: You've isolated so hard you forgot how to people. Solitude is medicine but too much becomes poison. Come out of the cave occasionally — the world has snacks and sunlight.

connections.narrative: The Wi-Fi Hermit encounters The Chill Hang — the search deepens into surrender. You've been looking so hard you forgot how to be still. Wisdom isn't always found by seeking; sometimes it sneaks in when you stop doom-scrolling for meaning.

The Wi-Fi Hermit sees The Hopepunk Star — the solo cave journey was worth it. The light you found in the dark? Other people need to see it too. Come out of hermit mode; your insights are shareable content now.

name: RNGesus
uprightMeaning: The wheel is spinning and your number might just come up. Luck, fate, the algorithm — whatever you call it, something bigger is turning. Ride the wave while it lasts, but don't get cocky. The wheel giveth and the wheel taketh away.
reversedMeaning: Bad luck streak — the universe is rolling nat 1s on your behalf. Don't spiral; wheels turn. This too shall pass, but maybe don't make any big bets until the cycle flips.

connections.narrative: RNGesus and The Big Unsubscribe — the wheel turns and something ends simultaneously. Luck changes and so must you. A change of circumstances isn't the same as a change of self, but when they arrive together, you're being upgraded, not just relocated.

RNGesus meets The Wake-Up Call — a turning point in circumstances AND an inner alarm going off. You're not just being carried by events; you're being asked to respond to them. The wheel presents the opportunity; the wake-up call asks what you'll do with it.

name: Receipts
uprightMeaning: The truth will out. Actions have consequences, karma keeps records, and the universe is about to present its case with citations. If you've been playing fair, relax — you'll like the verdict. If not... maybe settle out of court.
reversedMeaning: You're avoiding accountability like it's a Terms of Service page. Justice delayed isn't justice denied, and the bill is accruing interest. Own your stuff before someone else does it for you, and less kindly.

connections.narrative: Receipts and The Wake-Up Call — today's verdict meets the final audit. What seems fair now might be reweighed under a brighter light. Your actions echo beyond the present. Make choices you'd be comfortable having read aloud at your cosmic performance review.

name: The Chill Hang
uprightMeaning: You're suspended in a moment of forced pause and it feels like limbo, but it's actually a loading screen. The universe has you in time-out for a reason. Stop struggling, surrender to the upside-down, and let the new perspective download.
reversedMeaning: You're stuck and blaming everything except your refusal to let go. The hang isn't a punishment — it's a preview. See things differently before you're allowed to move. Yes, it's frustrating. No, fighting it won't help.

connections.narrative: The Chill Hang followed by The Big Unsubscribe — surrender before transformation. You can't be remade while you're still death-gripping your old shape. The pause isn't punishment; it's prep. Let go, not in defeat, but in readiness. The next version of you is loading.

name: The Big Unsubscribe
uprightMeaning: Something is ending, and honestly? It was time. Death is just the universe's way of saying 'you've outgrown this, I'm taking it away for your own good.' Grieve the loss, then check your pockets — you might find you're lighter without it.
reversedMeaning: You're clinging to a corpse of a situation and it's starting to smell. The thing you're afraid to lose is already gone; you're just holding the receipt. Let it decompose. Compost becomes flowers.

connections.narrative: The Big Unsubscribe and The Vibe Balancer — transformation finding its equilibrium. Endings don't need to be rushed OR resisted. Between the unsubscribe and the new subscription, there's a free trial period of just... being. Use it.

The Big Unsubscribe and The Hopepunk Star — the classic 'door closes, window opens' but make it cosmic. What's being ripped away is making room for something actually aligned with who you're becoming. Grieve, then look up. The light already clocked in.

name: The Vibe Balancer
uprightMeaning: You're the alchemist, mixing chaos and calm in exactly the right proportions. Moderation isn't boring — it's the secret sauce that keeps everything from catching fire. Find your middle path and walk it like a runway.
reversedMeaning: You're oscillating between extremes trying to find balance by swinging harder. That's not how pendulums work. Slow down. The middle path isn't a compromise; it's a strategy.

connections.narrative: The Vibe Balancer versus The Toxic Ex — moderation holding the line against obsession. Your inner monk is arm-wrestling your inner demon. Can you keep the middle path when something is pulling hard toward the edge? The balanced choice is the brave choice here.

name: The Toxic Ex
uprightMeaning: Something has a grip on you — a habit, a person, a 'treat yourself' that's become 'trap yourself.' You know it's bad for you. That little whisper of 'one more time'? That's not your friend. That's the devil wearing your favorite hoodie.
reversedMeaning: You're this close to breaking free but you've convinced yourself the cage is cozy. Spoiler: it's still a cage. The chains are loose enough to slip — you just have to want to. The door's been unlocked the whole time.

connections.narrative: The Toxic Ex triggers The Sudden Uninstall — the chains you couldn't break yourself get shattered by external force. What you wouldn't release voluntarily is being yeeted for you. Painful? Yes. Effective? Also yes. You're free now. Don't go back for the handcuffs.

name: The Sudden Uninstall
uprightMeaning: Everything you thought was stable is getting a surprise audit from the universe, and the inspectors brought sledgehammers. The tower was built on assumptions anyway. Let it crumble — the foundation that survives is the only part worth keeping.
reversedMeaning: You saw the cracks and kept decorating. Now the wall's coming down and you're acting surprised. The universe doesn't do 'gentle suggestions' when you ignore the polite warnings. Duck, cover, and thank the wrecking crew later.

connections.narrative: The Sudden Uninstall followed by The Hopepunk Star — the most iconic duo in tarot. Destruction clears the stage, then hope walks on. The lightning took out the fake stuff; the star illuminates what's left. You survived the collapse. What remains is realer than what fell.

name: The Hopepunk Star
uprightMeaning: After the chaos, after the rain, one stubborn little light is still twinkling. That's you. That's hope. It's not naive optimism — it's been-through-the-worst-and-still-here energy. Make a wish; you've earned the right.
reversedMeaning: You're hoping but not acting. Wishing on a star while your feet are stuck in cement. The light is real but you have to walk toward it. Hope is a direction, not a destination.

connections.narrative: The Hopepunk Star navigating The 3 AM Thoughts — your hope is real but the path is foggy. The light you follow exists, even when shadows try to gaslight you into thinking you imagined it. Keep walking. The moon is just a phase.

The Hopepunk Star becomes The Golden Retriever — hope graduating to full-blown joy. What started as a tiny wish in the dark is now broad daylight happiness. Don't feel guilty for feeling good. You walked through enough shadow; the sun is your severance package.

name: The 3 AM Thoughts
uprightMeaning: Something's lurking in the shadows and your brain is writing fanfiction about it at 3 AM. The moon distorts everything — molehills look like mountains, fears cosplay as intuitions. Shine a light on it; the monster is probably just a coat rack.
reversedMeaning: You're lost in the sauce of your own anxiety and calling it 'intuition.' The shadows are real but they're also shapeshifters. Get a second opinion from daylight before you make any life-altering decisions at midnight.

connections.narrative: The 3 AM Thoughts giving way to The Golden Retriever — the anxious night finally meeting its sunrise. Those shapes that haunted you? Coat racks. Those fears? Overblown. The dawn makes everything look manageable. Let the clarity in; it's not as scary as you thought.

name: The Golden Retriever
uprightMeaning: The sun is out, the vibes are immaculate, and you're radiating main-character-in-the-final-scene energy. Success, joy, vitality — this is the card that makes other cards jealous. Soak it in. You've earned this victory lap.
reversedMeaning: The sun's behind a cloud but it's still there. You're temporarily dimmed, not permanently dark. Don't let a passing mood convince you the light is gone. Vitamin D and a walk might literally fix it.

connections.narrative: The Golden Retriever and Achievement Unlocked — pure joy reaching its final form. This isn't a fleeting good mood; it's a completed cycle. You did the work, you took the hits, you made it. Celebrate like you mean it. The credits can roll for a minute before the sequel starts.

name: The Wake-Up Call
uprightMeaning: An alarm is going off in your soul and it's not the snooze-button kind. You're being called to rise, to answer for your choices, to become the version of yourself that future-you is waiting for. This is the rebirth. Say yes.
reversedMeaning: You're hitting snooze on your own awakening. The call is coming from inside the house and you're pretending it's a wrong number. Wake up. The person you're meant to become is getting impatient.

connections.narrative: The Wake-Up Call leads to Achievement Unlocked — you answered the call and it brought you to completion. You're not the same person who started this level. The new world you're stepping into? It matches the person you became. Rise and enter.

name: Achievement Unlocked
uprightMeaning: You've completed the cycle. The quest is done, the boss is defeated, the credits are rolling on this chapter of your life. Take the victory lap, do a little dance, and then — get ready. Completion just means you're ready for the next bigger thing.
reversedMeaning: You're almost at the finish line but you're slowing down because finishing is scary. What comes after the end? The next beginning. Don't delay your own completion just because you're afraid of the sequel.

name: Ace of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: New love or creative spark incoming. Your emotional inbox has a new message and it's not spam.
reversedMeaning: Emotional blockage. You've dammed up your feelings and the reservoir is getting dangerously full. Let a little out before it bursts.

name: Two of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A budding connection — romantic or platonic, someone just leveled up in your heart.
reversedMeaning: One-sided emotional investment. You're giving premium access to someone on a free trial. Read the terms and conditions.

name: Three of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Three's company and that's a good thing right now. Collaboration, celebration, possibly cake.
reversedMeaning: Overindulgence in feelings — you're marinating in your emotions like they're a gourmet dish. Time to get out of the bath.

name: Four of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You're being offered emotional stability in a chaotic time. Take it. Not everything has to be a rollercoaster.
reversedMeaning: Emotional numbness. Something should move you and it's not. Check if you're depressed or just exhausted — both need attention.

name: Five of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Something feels off and you're right. Check in on what you've been ignoring. The cups are half empty for a reason.
reversedMeaning: Avoiding the emotional accountability conversation. You know what you need to say. The discomfort of saying it is less than the cost of not.

name: Six of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Nostalgia is hitting hard — someone from your emotional past is knocking. Answer thoughtfully, not reflexively.
reversedMeaning: Living in the emotional past. The highlight reel of 'what could have been' is not a documentary. Return to the present.

name: Seven of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You've got options and they're all tempting. Don't let the variety paralyze you. Pick your favorite fantasy and commit.
reversedMeaning: Decision paralysis among too many emotional options. None of these choices are perfect and waiting won't make one appear. Pick and learn.

name: Eight of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Walking away from an emotional situation that no longer serves. It's not giving up; it's upgrading your peace.
reversedMeaning: You left but you're still mentally there. The physical exit happened; the emotional one is lagging. Finish the unsubscription.

name: Nine of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Wish granted. Your emotional investment is paying out. Enjoy the overflow without guilt.
reversedMeaning: Emotional dissatisfaction despite having everything you asked for. The goalpost moved because you moved it. What are you actually chasing?

name: Ten of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Emotional completion. Your cup is full, your heart is content. This is the 'happily ever after' slide. Savor it.
reversedMeaning: Emotional burnout. You gave everything and the well is dry. Refill before you offer anyone else a drink.

name: Page of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A dreamer with a message. Creative inspiration delivered by a soft-hearted messenger. Listen to the gentle nudge.
reversedMeaning: The messenger got lost or the message was fake. Romantic delusions incoming. Vet the vibe before you invest.

name: Knight of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A romantic offer is riding toward you at full speed. Charming, intense, possibly wearing armor. Say yes to the adventure.
reversedMeaning: Charming but unreliable. The romantic gesture is grand but the follow-through is absent. Don't fall for the trailer; wait for the full movie.

name: Queen of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The emotional grown-up in the room. Nurture others but don't forget yourself. Your empathy is a superpower, not a service.
reversedMeaning: Emotional smothering. Your care is becoming control. Love gives roots AND wings. Check if you're clipping someone's flight feathers.

name: King of Cups (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Master of emotional intelligence. You've been through the waves and learned to surf. Lead with heart; the competence is assumed.
reversedMeaning: Emotional manipulation dressed as maturity. You know better and you're using it to win arguments instead of solve problems. Do better.

name: Ace of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A spark of inspiration. New energy, new project, new reason to get out of bed excited. Say yes before your brain talks you out of it.
reversedMeaning: The spark won't catch. Frustrating, but maybe the kindling is wet for a reason. Reassess before you strike another match.

name: Two of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You're holding the map for the next adventure. Planning mode is active, and the destination looks amazing.
reversedMeaning: Overplanning, under-doing. Your vision board is a museum of things you haven't started. Pick one Post-it and actually execute.

name: Three of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Your ship has come in — or at least it's visible on the horizon. Progress is happening. Keep sailing.
reversedMeaning: Setbacks in a project. Progress isn't linear and this dip is part of the curve. Don't abandon ship; patch the leak and keep sailing.

name: Four of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Celebration unlocked. The good vibes are earned, not borrowed. Enjoy the party guilt-free.
reversedMeaning: The celebration is over and the cleanup crew just arrived. Post-event slump is real. Transition gently, not abruptly.

name: Five of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Conflict incoming — but the productive kind. Competition brings out your best. Just keep it sporty, not personal.
reversedMeaning: Conflict that's become personal and petty. You're fighting to win, not to resolve. Step back and ask what you're actually defending.

name: Six of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Victory parade energy. You've won something, and people are noticing. Take the lap.
reversedMeaning: The victory felt hollow because it was at someone else's expense. Winning isn't everything if the trophy is made of bad karma.

name: Seven of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Defending your territory. You've built something and someone's testing the fences. Stand firm but don't become a fortress.
reversedMeaning: Defensive to the point of paranoia. Not everyone is attacking your kingdom. Lower the drawbridge occasionally.

name: Eight of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Things are moving fast — almost too fast. Adapt or get whiplash. The momentum is good even if the speed is scary.
reversedMeaning: Moving too fast and dropping things. Slow down before you cause a crash that wasn't necessary. Speed limits exist for a reason.

name: Nine of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You've been through the wands wringer and you're still standing. Resilience is your brand now. Don't give up at the 90% mark.
reversedMeaning: Burnout is knocking and you're pretending you can't hear it. Pushing through stopped being heroic three exhaustion levels ago. Rest.

name: Ten of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You're carrying a lot. Too much, honestly. Delegate, drop, or distribute before your back (and spirit) gives out.
reversedMeaning: The burden broke you. You took on too much and now everything's on the floor. It's okay. Pick up what matters; leave what doesn't.

name: Page of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: An exciting message or opportunity inbound. Your enthusiasm is contagious — spread it responsibly.
reversedMeaning: Bad news, delayed message, or cold feet about an opportunity. The enthusiasm has waned. Rekindle or release, but don't ghost.

name: Knight of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Bold, passionate, charging forward. You know what you want and you're going after it. Just don't trample the bystanders.
reversedMeaning: Reckless and chaotic. Bold without brains is just noise. Temper the charge with a crumb of strategy.

name: Queen of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Warm, confident, magnetic. You're the leader people actually want to follow. Lead with vision and don't forget the little people.
reversedMeaning: Warmth turned to manipulation. Your charisma is being used for control, not connection. People aren't projects.

name: King of Wands (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The visionary who gets things done. You've mastered the art of starting AND finishing. That's rare. That's powerful. That's you.
reversedMeaning: Vision without execution. You know where you want to go but you've stopped walking. A map is not a journey. Take a step.

name: Ace of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A breakthrough thought arrives like lightning. Sharp, sudden, and slightly terrifying. Write it down before it vanishes.
reversedMeaning: The idea is there but you won't let it land. Afraid of your own thoughts. Write it down anyway; the paper can handle it.

name: Two of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You're at a crossroads and neither option is clear. The classic hard choice. Pick the one that costs you your illusions, not your values.
reversedMeaning: Indecision has become its own choice. By not choosing, you've chosen stagnation. Both options are survivable. Pick one.

name: Three of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Heartbreak in card form. Something hurts and it's okay to acknowledge it. Feeling pain means you cared. That's not weakness.
reversedMeaning: The pain is processing. Grief isn't linear and you're in the messy middle. Keep feeling it. The only way out is through.

name: Four of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Rest is not optional right now. Your brain has been running a marathon and it needs a nap. Lie down. The thoughts will wait.
reversedMeaning: Restless rest. You're physically still but mentally spinning. That's not rest, that's just lying down while stressed. Try again.

name: Five of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Conflict. You might be the instigator or the target — either way, don't fight dirty. Win the battle without losing yourself.
reversedMeaning: Conflict aftermath — you won but the battlefield is still smoking. Victory can feel like loss when the cost was too high. Rebuild.

name: Six of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You're moving away from a hard situation. The boat is crossing rough water but the other shore is better. Keep rowing.
reversedMeaning: You left but you're looking back. The journey away is complete but your heart hasn't received the memo. Keep sailing.

name: Seven of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Sneaky tactics or strategic maneuvering. Someone's playing 4D chess — make sure it's you and not the person you're trusting.
reversedMeaning: You got caught. The sneaky plan unraveled and now you're standing in the evidence. Time for the uncomfortable honesty chapter.

name: Eight of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Feeling trapped by your own thoughts. The cage door is unlocked but you're too busy overthinking to notice. Look again.
reversedMeaning: The mental prison is of your own design. The beliefs trapping you are assumptions, not facts. Challenge them like a lawyer cross-examining a hostile witness.

name: Nine of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The mental anguish is real but you're amplifying it. Your brain is running disaster simulations at 4K resolution. Reduce the graphics settings.
reversedMeaning: The worst of it is passing and you're still catastrophizing. Your brain is running worst-case scenarios when the actual situation is just 'kinda bad.' Recalibrate.

name: Ten of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Rock bottom of the mind. The overthinking spiral has reached its final form. The only way from here is up, and you're closer to release than you think.
reversedMeaning: Recovery from mental rock bottom. The thoughts are quieter now but you're still flinching. Healing is a process, not a switch. Be patient with your brain.

name: Page of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A sharp-eyed observer with a message. Truth incoming — perhaps delivered bluntly. Receive the intel, don't shoot the messenger.
reversedMeaning: The message was mean or maybe just true and that's why it stung. Either way, you needed to hear it. Process before reacting.

name: Knight of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A warrior of the mind charging forward. Bold ideas, fast action, zero hesitation. Impulsive but effective. Aim before you swing.
reversedMeaning: Reckless words or impulsive intellectual attacks. Your sharp tongue cut someone who didn't deserve it. Apologies cost nothing and mean everything.

name: Queen of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The thinker with emotional depth. Logic and intuition in harmony — a rare and powerful combination. You see through everything.
reversedMeaning: Cold logic without emotional intelligence. You're right but you're also being mean about it. Wisdom pairs clarity with kindness.

name: King of Swords (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The master of mental clarity. You've learned to use the sword without cutting yourself. Authority earned through wisdom, not force.
reversedMeaning: Using intellect as a weapon. You've weaponized your intelligence to dominate rather than understand. The smartest person in the room doesn't need to prove it.

name: Ace of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A tangible opportunity is landing. Money, work, or a physical gift. The universe is making a deposit. Check your account.
reversedMeaning: A missed opportunity or bad investment. The deal wasn't as good as it looked. Learn the lesson, don't chase the loss.

name: Two of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Juggling resources like a pro — or learning to. Balance isn't static; it's constant small adjustments. You're getting better at this.
reversedMeaning: Financial juggling gone wrong. You're dropping balls and some of them are made of money. Time for a budget reality check.

name: Three of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Skill recognition incoming. Someone's noticed your craft and wants to pay you for it. Your expertise has market value.
reversedMeaning: Undervaluing your own skills. You're charging amateur rates for professional work. Know your worth and add tax.

name: Four of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Holding onto resources a little too tightly. Saving is smart; hoarding is fear. Money is a tool, not a personality trait.
reversedMeaning: Financial anxiety gripping too tight. The scarcity mindset is costing you more than the money you're afraid to lose. Breathe. Spend wisely, not fearfully.

name: Five of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: You're in need and it's okay to ask for help. Everyone hits a rough patch. The pride that stops you from reaching out costs more than the hit to your ego.
reversedMeaning: You're isolating in your struggle. The help is available but you're too proud to ask. Pride doesn't pay rent. Reach out.

name: Six of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Generosity is your flex right now. Sharing what you have — time, money, knowledge — creates more of it. Abundance mindset, literally.
reversedMeaning: Giving beyond your means. Generosity is beautiful; self-sacrifice is not. You can't pour from an empty wallet or an empty soul.

name: Seven of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Patience is the strategy. You planted seeds and they're growing, just slower than your anxiety wants. Don't dig them up to check progress.
reversedMeaning: Impatience is making you sloppy. The results will come but you're checking the oven every two minutes. Trust the process and stop opening the door.

name: Eight of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Mastery through repetition. You're putting in the hours and it shows. The craft is becoming second nature. Keep the rhythm.
reversedMeaning: Going through the motions. The craft has become routine and the passion leaked out somewhere. Reconnect with why you started, or start something new.

name: Nine of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Financial (or creative) rewards from your own efforts. You built this with your hands and it's beautiful. Enjoy the fruits without apology.
reversedMeaning: Financial setback despite hard work. The effort was there but the results lagged. Don't take it personally; the market is a mood, not a meritocracy.

name: Ten of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: Material and emotional wealth achieved. You've built something lasting. The legacy question is no longer 'if' but 'what next.'
reversedMeaning: Lost inheritance, bad financial decision, or family money drama. The material world is being difficult. Protect what you have and make no big moves.

name: Page of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: A studious soul with a practical offer. Learn something new that pays actual money. Practical skills, unexpected rewards.
reversedMeaning: The opportunity was oversold. The study offer or financial tip isn't as valuable as advertised. Read the fine print on the dream they're selling you.

name: Knight of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The reliable hard worker. Consistent, grounded, effective. Not flashy, but always gets it done. The team MVP who never asks for credit.
reversedMeaning: All grind, no purpose. You're working hard in the wrong direction. Consistent effort is only a virtue if the target is worth hitting.

name: Queen of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The nurturer who builds real things. Practical and warm — a rare combo. You make people feel safe AND you get stuff done.
reversedMeaning: Smothering practicality. Your obsession with security is choking the joy out of life. A safety net is essential; a cage is not.

name: King of Pentacles (chaotic edition)
uprightMeaning: The accomplished one. You've climbed the mountain and the view is great. But you know the secret: the real reward was the climb itself.
reversedMeaning: Material success without fulfillment. You got everything you wanted and it's not enough. The goal was external; the void is internal. Time for a different kind of wealth.
